Phase-28.NAME: Verified Registration Cutover
Phase-28.Goal: Switch KrotPN registration to verified-email activation while preserving trial, VPN provisioning, referrals, and frontend onboarding.

NonGoals.item-1: No MTProto runtime integration yet; this phase prepares the verified onboarding boundary.
NonGoals.item-2: No Telegram auth behavior changes unless required to avoid regression.

Steps.step-1: Change /api/v1/auth/register contract to create a pending registration and send verification email instead of issuing tokens immediately.
Steps.step-2: Add /api/v1/auth/verify-email or equivalent endpoint that consumes the one-time token and creates the canonical user row.
Steps.step-3: Move existing post-registration side effects behind successful verification: trial subscription, primary VPN device, VPN client provisioning, and referral linkage.
Steps.step-4: Update frontend Register flow to show check-email, expired-link, resend, and verified-success states.
Steps.step-5: Preserve session-security assumptions from M-039 and ensure login/refresh/logout compatibility remains green.
Steps.step-6: Add regression tests proving unverified users do not get trial, VPN config, referral bonus, or JWT tokens.

Verification.command: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_verified_registration.py tests/test_email_verification_guard.py tests/test_manual_access_policy.py tests/test_device_api.py tests/test_referrals.py tests/test_telegram_auth.py tests/test_security.py -v
node scripts/phase28-register-flow-smoke.mjs; cd frontend && npm run build

python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-28.xml docs/verification/V-M-041.xml docs/verification/V-M-002.xml docs/verification/V-M-004.xml docs/verification/V-M-005.xml docs/verification/V-M-022.xml docs/verification/V-M-009.xml docs/verification-index.xml; mygrace lint

AcceptanceCriteria.item-1: Unverified registration returns a pending/check-email response and does not create active access.
AcceptanceCriteria.item-2: Verified activation creates exactly one user, one trial if no history exists, and one primary VPN device path.
AcceptanceCriteria.item-3: Token replay, expired token, duplicate email, and blocked domain paths are deterministic.
AcceptanceCriteria.item-4: Frontend registration remains mobile-safe and avoids confusing users about trial availability.

Completion.item-1: /api/v1/auth/register now returns pending/check-email response without JWT or onboarding side effects.
Completion.item-2: /api/v1/auth/verify-email consumes one-time token, creates verified user, then activates trial, primary device path, VPN provisioning call, and referral linkage once.
Completion.item-3: User frontend now has Register pending/resend state and VerifyEmail success/expired/error route.
Completion.item-4: Session smoke was updated so token storage starts at VerifyEmail success, not Register submit.

Risks.risk-1: Changing /register response shape can break frontend and external clients if not staged carefully.
Risks.risk-2: Partially completed activation can duplicate trial/referral side effects unless idempotency is explicit.
